name: afo-fsl-v4-compress-mcp
description: FSL V4 tiered SEMANTIC compression engine - lossy keyword-fingerprint compression (header/codex/tier1/tier1.5/tier2/tier2.5). Unlike raw-storage compressors, this NEVER persists original file content - only statistical term fingerprints per chunk. Produces the actual .v4.fsl tiered text format for direct LLM consumption.
